label_notes: Source: training knowledge (WebFetch blocked 2026-03-20). Based on Character.AI privacy documentation through early 2025. Notable: Young user base (minimum age 13) but limited transparency on parental controls. Conversations used for model training is central to service. Security measures not extensively detailed in public policy.
